sections.paragraph:
μνημεῖον, ου, τό [μνήμη] ‘a place for depositing remains of a deceased pers. held in memory’

—a. w. focus on explicit function of celebrating a distinguished deceased pers., monument, memorial Lk 11:47. Otherwise in NT

—b. in general burial place, grave, tomb Mt 8:28; 23:29; 27:52f al. Of unrecognizable graves Lk 11:44.
